rationale: Acting on Review 1's findings (real, directly confirmed in diff at includeRight_apply:129 (rfl on identical defs), map_tmul:214 (special case of Mathlib Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_tmul after map unfold), map_toAlgHom:250 and map_toCoalgHom:258) yields a materially smaller/less-duplicative public @[simp] surface for this baseChange API; Review 2's approve would merge the needless duplication.
